testcase.name: testDashScopeWanx

error.message: {"statusCode":400,"message":"Access denied, please make sure your account is in good standing. For details, see: https://help.aliyun.com/zh/model-studio/error-code#overdue-payment","code":"Arrearage","isJson":true,"requestId":"ef2bef98-294b-4900-89cd-b691815db01f"}

testcase.error: com.alibaba.dashscope.exception.ApiException: {"statusCode":400,"message":"Access denied, please make sure your account is in good standing. testcase.name: testChat2

error.message: I/O error on POST request for "http://localhost:11434/api/chat": Failed to connect to localhost/[0:0:0:0:0:0:0:1]:11434

testcase.name: testChat3

error.message: {"statusCode":400,"message":"Access denied, please make sure your account is in good standing. For details, see: https://help.aliyun.com/zh/model-studio/error-code#overdue-payment","code":"Arrearage","isJson":true,"requestId":"0eaefe2a-c2b2-43f1-a62e-5e39c9a5ceb5"}
